message:
feat(cli): Add shell completions module and generation command

New src/completions.rs provides:
- Shell enum for bash, zsh, fish, powershell, elvish
- Per-shell config file paths and installation instructions
- Completions output to stdout, instructions to stderr (pipeable)
- Integration with clap_complete for script generation

CLI changes:
- New 'completions' subcommand: xf completions <shell>
- Styled installation instructions using theme colors
- lib.rs: Export completions module
- cli.rs: Minor argument parsing improvement

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
